title: FutureNeo
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fc50a7c001f9ab1d5dc30373be836e891a493ab.png)

**Pack Version** (Last)**:** v7.1

**Created by:** 
> Me ( [@GalacticUniv](https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R) )

**Available in the following versions:**
> 1.7.10 - 1.8.9 | 1.16 - 1.20.1 | 1.20.2+

**Tags**: 
> Custom, Cyan, Pink, Black, 32x, FutureNeo, Gradient

**Description:**
> FutureNeo is one of the most updated yet oldest texture packs in my Discord server, with over 7 different versions (though we only have the 7th one, as the others are lost). This pack holds a special meaning for me as it’s become somewhat of a personal brand. It’s one of those projects that reflects a lot of what I love and what defines me.
> 
> The main theme is black with a gradient silhouette of pink and light blue, giving it a unique touch. It has everything needed to be a solid and stylish PvP texture pack!
> 
> This texture pack is designed for Netherite only, but you can download the diamond version in our Discord!

> Don't forget that downloading the texture pack from the official sources (In PlanetMinecraft) is a huge way to support us! <3

> If you have any questions or want to report a bug, feel free to do so through our official Discord:
> <https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R>

> You can also follow us on social media! :D
> <https://solo.to/galacticuniv> 

![Compatible with](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/960c76ddd8a7ab7c7e79ad788f87bc2899f76960_0.webp)
- You can download Apple Skin here: [Download Apple Skin (Modrinth)](<https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin>)
- You can download Fabric Sky Boxes here: [Download Fabric Sky Boxes (Modrinth)](<https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes>)
